description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in a long, patterned overcoat that extends to the ankles, worn over a knee-length skirt. The individual has a natural skin tone and is depicted with a neutral, upright posture, arms relaxed at the sides. The overcoat features a repeating geometric motif, and the skirt beneath is plain and visible at the hem. The person is wearing open-toed sandals with a strap design. The hairstyle is neatly styled, with hair pulled back and away from the face. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of a casually dressed adult suitable for an urban environment.
description: An adult pedestrian in a long patterned overcoat, knee-length skirt, and open-toed sandals, with hair pulled back and a relaxed upright posture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the patterned overcoat, the visible hand, and the back of the head with hair pulled back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the overcoat, the skirt hem, and both feet in sandals.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the face, front of the overcoat, and both hands, with the skirt and sandals visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the face, chest, and front of the overcoat, with the hair pulled back and both arms visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long patterned overcoat and knee-length skirt
attribute_hairstyle: hair pulled back in a neat style
